title: Technology in Daily Life
text: Technology has become a big part of our daily lives. People use smartphones, computers, and the internet for work, study, and entertainment.

Salma believes that technology makes life easier, especially for communication and learning. However, she also notices that people sometimes spend too much time on their devices. This can reduce face-to-face communication and negatively affect relationships.

Salma tries to use technology wisely. She limits her screen time and focuses on using technology as a tool, not a habit. She believes that balance is the key to enjoying the benefits without the negative effects.

questions.question: How does technology help people?
questions.answer: It helps with work, learning, and communication

questions.question: What problem does Salma notice about technology use?
questions.answer: People spend too much time on their devices

questions.question: Why does Salma limit her screen time?
questions.answer: To avoid the negative effects of technology

questions.question: What can we infer about the way technology should be used?
questions.answer: It should be used in a balanced and controlled way

questions.question: Do you agree that technology helps daily life when used wisely? Why?
questions.answer: Yes, because it makes daily tasks easier when used in a balanced way
